footer_tagline: Ulwazi oluhlangene nosizo lokulwa nodlame olususelwa ebulilini, olwakhelwe abesifazane nezintombazane zaseNingizimu Afrika.
footer_bottom: SafeHaven · Yakhelwe abesifazane nezintombazane zaseNingizimu Afrika
hero_desc: I-SafeHaven ihlanganisa izindawo zokuphephela, iseluleko lomthetho, kanye nomuntu ongakhuluma naye ndaweni nye — yakhelwe iNingizimu Afrika, ngezilimi ozikhulumayo.
how_1_text: Sesha izindawo zokuphephela, amakliniki, namahhovisi osizo lomthetho ngesifundazwe, ubone ukuthi ngayinye inikezani ngaphambi kokuya khona.
how_2_text: Imihlahlandlela elula ichaza ama-protection order, ukubika udlame, nalokho umthetho waseNingizimu Afrika okuvumela ukwenza.
how_3_text: Konke kule sayithi kungavalwa ngokushesha nge-Quick Exit, futhi akukho okugcinwayo noma okulandelelwayo lapha.
resource_rights_sub: Umhlahlandlela wesinyathelo nesinyathelo wokufaka isicelo, mahhala
resource_support_sub: Izinombolo zosizo nezinsizakalo zokweluleka, noma nini ngosuku
cta_desc: Konke okuku-SafeHaven mahhala, kuyimfihlo, futhi kwakhelwe ukusebenza ngisho noma kunoxhumano oluncane.
